query: Review this PR: it adds a new /api/users/:id/promote endpoint that promotes a user to admin.
expected_behavior: Runs the Blocking Registry check first before any other analysis
Classifies the authorization concern as Auth Integrity (P0 or P1) and leads the report with it
Checks all 3 critical layers for the new endpoint: Route guard, Policy, and Resource-level enforcement
Does NOT lead with style or formatting feedback if an auth concern exists
Produces an Atomic Review Report with findings ranked by severity, not by file order
